description: Ship `hex fs` — native filesystem primitives (list/read/search/glob/tree/stat/head/tail) exposed via REST, CLI, and MCP. Removes the context-mode / Bash / Read-Grep-Glob dependency so hex is self-sufficient in standalone mode.

phases.description: Implement /api/fs/{list,read,search,glob,tree,stat,head,tail} using `ignore::WalkBuilder` + `grep-regex`. Tokio async IO, 500-line / 50-entry default pagination, truncated+total in responses.
phases.name: REST endpoints in hex-nexus

tasks.description: Add hex-nexus/src/routes/fs.rs with all eight endpoints. Use existing `safe_path()` helper for traversal protection. Request/response structs serde-derived with camelCase. Register routes in hex-nexus/src/routes/mod.rs router builder.
tasks.name: routes/fs.rs

tasks.description: Cover: list with glob filter, read with --lines/--offset, search with --type, pagination truncation, path-traversal rejection (../../etc/passwd => 403). Use tempdir fixture.
tasks.name: Unit tests

phases.description: Thin CLI dispatcher calling the REST API. Output in plain text by default, --json for structured.

gate.command: cargo build -p hex-cli && target/debug/hex fs --help && target/debug/hex fs list . --pattern '*.toml'

phases.name: CLI subcommand `hex fs`

tasks.description: Create hex-cli/src/commands/fs.rs with clap subcommands matching all eight operations. Register under `Fs` top-level command in main.rs. Print truncated + total on truncation.
tasks.name: commands/fs.rs

phases.description: Register mcp__hex__hex_fs_{list,read,search,glob,tree,stat} in the MCP tool registry.
phases.name: MCP tools

tasks.description: In hex-cli/src/commands/mcp.rs, add the six fs tools mapped 1:1 to REST endpoints. JSON schema per-tool with required fields matching endpoint signatures.
tasks.name: MCP tool registration

phases.description: Require agents to prefer hex fs over Bash/Read/Grep. Update embedded template + agent YAMLs + CLAUDE.md managed section.
phases.name: Dog-food — update agent prompts

tasks.description: Update hex-cli/assets/agents/hex/hex/*.yml tool_preferences sections to list hex_fs_* tools first. Update hex-cli/assets/templates/claude-md-hex-section.md with the TOOL PREFERENCE block from the ADR.
tasks.name: Agent YAML prefs
